ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emulators" (
  "emulator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emulator */,
  "emulator_name" TEXT /* Name of the emulator */,
  "latest_version" TEXT /* Latest version number of the emulator */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the emulator was released */,
  "guest_emulation_capabilities" TEXT /* List of guest emulation capabilities supported by the emulator */,
  "host_os_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host operating systems supported */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the licensing information of the emulator */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the emulator */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the emulator's website */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL of the emulator's documentation */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* System requirements for running the emulator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emulator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulators_host_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("host_os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulators_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulators_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "host_os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the operating system (e.g., x86, ARM) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the license (e.g., Freeware, GPL, MIT License) */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the developer's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "emulator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emulator being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the emulator (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_title" TEXT /* Title of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_emulator_id FOREIGN KEY ("emulator_id") REFERENCES emulators ("emulator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emulator_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "emulator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emulator being updated */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* New version number after the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Details of the updates made */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulator_updates_emulator_id FOREIGN KEY ("emulator_id") REFERENCES emulators ("emulator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emulator_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "emulator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emulator being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user using the emulator */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the emulator has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the emulator was last used */,
  "total_time_used" INTEGER /* Total time the emulator has been used in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulator_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulator_usage_emulator_id FOREIGN KEY ("emulator_id") REFERENCES emulators ("emulator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emulator_compatiblity_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "emulator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emulator with the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the compatibility issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emulator_compatiblity_issues_emulator_id FOREIGN KEY ("emulator_id") REFERENCES emulators ("emulator_id")
)
